notFoundPage.title: This page is outside the current route map.
notFoundPage.description: The address you opened does not point to a live MyRelay page. Head back to the main workspace entry and continue from there.

route.title: Check the path
route.body: The URL may be incomplete, outdated, or pointing to a route that no longer exists.

home.title: Start from home
home.body: Use the main landing page to move back into the correct public, auth, or protected area.

retry.title: Try again
retry.body: If this link came from another screen, refresh your navigation path and reopen the intended page.

home.title: MyRelay
home.description: The product has one app, one backend, and one database, but different users see different areas and actions depending on their role.

about.title: About | MyRelay
about.description: Learn how MyRelay transforms business support operations with structured ticket workflows, real-time conversations, and role-based collaboration.

login.title: Login | MyRelay
login.description: Sign in to access your MyRelay workspace, tickets, and role-based support actions.

register.title: Register | MyRelay
register.description: Create a MyRelay account to start submitting tickets and continue into the support workspace for your role.

newTicket.title: New Ticket | MyRelay
newTicket.description: Create a new support ticket in MyRelay and capture the issue with the context your team needs.

profile.title: Profile | MyRelay
profile.description: Review your MyRelay account details, verification status, and profile actions in one place.

security.title: Security | MyRelay
security.description: Manage security access and protection settings for your MyRelay workspace account.

test.title: Test | MyRelay
test.description: Internal MyRelay test page used for validating public route rendering and behavior.

validation.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.subject_min: Subject must be at least 3 characters
validation.description_min: Description must be at least 3 characters

heroSection.title: One workspace for support tickets, role-based actions, and real-time replies.
heroSection.subtitle: MyRelay brings ticket management and per-ticket chat into one product so users, agents, and admins can move through the same system with the permissions each role needs.
heroSection.featureTicketsBody: Track support work from creation to closure with a clear status flow.
heroSection.featureChatBody: Keep every ticket conversation live and attached to the issue it belongs to.
heroSection.featureRolesBody: Expose only the screens and actions each user, agent, or admin should see.
heroSection.workflowSubtitle: The core flow starts with HTTP ticket creation, then continues with live communication and role-based handling inside the same app.

aboutPage.title: We turn support operations into a connected service workflow.
aboutPage.description: MyRelay helps businesses replace scattered requests, disconnected conversations, and unclear ownership with a single support workspace built around the ticket.
aboutPage.highlightTitle: From fragmented service work to accountable execution
aboutPage.highlightBody: One app, one support workflow, and one source of truth for every issue moving across users, agents, and admins.

highlightItems.handoffs: Keep every reply attached to the ticket
highlightItems.ownership: Make responsibility visible at every stage

aboutPage.pillarsTitle: The shift businesses feel after moving into MyRelay
aboutPage.pillarsDescription: The platform is designed around the ticket lifecycle, live communication, and role-based permissions so support stops living in scattered tools.

visibility.title: From scattered intake to one operating queue
visibility.body: Instead of losing requests across inboxes, chats, and ad-hoc notes, teams capture every issue in a persistent ticket record.

collaboration.title: From disconnected updates to live collaboration
collaboration.body: Real-time ticket chat keeps users and support teams aligned in the same thread while work continues through each status.

governance.title: From generic tooling to role-based control
governance.body: Users, agents, and admins share one product while only seeing the screens, actions, and data relevant to their role.

aboutPage.journeyTitle: Each ticket becomes a reliable business record
aboutPage.journeyDescription: MyRelay combines HTTP-based ticket management with Socket.IO chat so operational work moves with both structure and speed.

capture.title: Capture the issue
capture.body: A customer or internal user creates a ticket with the context the team needs to start work.

route.title: Route the ownership
route.body: Agents pick up, assign, and manage the ticket lifecycle with clear status changes from open to closed.

resolve.title: Collaborate in real time
resolve.body: The live chat stays attached to the ticket so replies, clarifications, and decisions remain connected to the case.

improve.title: Close with accountability
improve.body: The business keeps a durable record of what happened, who handled it, and how quickly support moved.

aboutPage.rolesDescription: The same platform adapts to the people involved in service delivery without splitting work across separate tools.

user.title: Users
user.body: Submit tickets, follow their own cases, and stay inside a clear support experience.

agent.title: Agents
agent.body: Manage inbox work, join ticket conversations, and move issues through resolution.

admin.title: Admins
admin.body: Oversee access, operations, and the broader system visibility the business needs as the workflow grows.

aboutPage.ctaTitle: Build a support operation your business can actually run on.
aboutPage.ctaDescription: If support matters to revenue, retention, or service quality, the workflow needs more than messages. MyRelay gives the business a structured, real-time operating layer.

registerPage.title: Create your MyRelay account
registerPage.description: Use the details you plan to keep using across the platform. A clear username and a valid email make onboarding and access management much smoother.
registerPage.guideItem1: Use an email address you can access right away for verification and recovery.
registerPage.guideItem2: Pick a username your team will recognize quickly in shared spaces.
registerPage.guideItem3: Set a password with at least 8 characters and confirm it exactly.
registerPage.guideItem4: Keep these details personal so permissions and activity stay traceable.
registerPage.nextBody: After registration, you can sign in and continue into the workspace and actions available for your role.

loginPage.title: Sign in to continue your support workflow
loginPage.description: Access the same MyRelay workspace with the screens and actions available for your role, whether you are opening tickets, replying to customers, or managing operations.
loginPage.guideItem1: Use the username or email address tied to your account.
loginPage.guideItem2: Agents and admins enter through the same app and see their role-based areas after login.
loginPage.guideItem3: Your tickets, inbox, and dashboard access depend on the permissions assigned to your account.
loginPage.registerBody: Create a new account to start submitting tickets and continue into the product with your own workspace access.

profilePage.title: Your account details in one place
profilePage.description: Review the information attached to your MyRelay account, including your role, contact details, verification state, and account history.

ticketActions.description: Start a new support request when you need help or want to report an issue.

danger.description: Deleting your account removes your access and account data from this workspace.

modal.title: Delete this account?
modal.subtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
modal.description: If you continue, you will lose access to MyRelay and the profile data connected to this account will be removed.
